name: traffic escapee
description: The red car is stuck in traffic — and only you can free it! Slide the blocking cars out of the way to clear a path and steer the red car to the exit. Easy to learn, tricky to master: 124 hand-crafted levels across 12 worlds, from a cozy garage to a busy harbor. Earn 3 stars for perfect solutions, take on a brand-new Daily Challenge every day, and unlock a garage full of cool car skins. Can you solve every jam?
instructions: Tap and drag a car to slide it along its lane Clear the way and move the red car to the EXIT on the right
